channel.title: TheChessLifestyle Blog
channel.description: Expert chess coaching tips, strategies and guides by FIDE Rated coach Chirag Soni. Online chess classes for kids and adults worldwide.

item.title: Online Chess Coach vs Self-Study: Which Is Better for Improving Faster?
item.description: Comparing online chess coaching vs self-study with apps like Chess.com and Lichess. A FIDE Rated coach explains what actually works for rapid improvement at every level.
item.author: hello@thechesslifestyle.com (Chirag Soni)

item.title: How to Teach Chess to a Child: A Complete Parent's Guide
item.description: Learn exactly how to teach chess to your child at any age — from 5-year-olds learning piece movements to 12-year-olds preparing for tournaments. Step-by-step guide from a FIDE Rated coach.
item.author: hello@thechesslifestyle.com (Chirag Soni)

item.title: How to Improve Your Chess Rating Fast: A FIDE Coach's Complete Guide
item.description: Want to improve your chess rating quickly? FIDE Rated coach Chirag Soni shares the exact training system used with students who gained 200+ rating points in under a year.
item.author: hello@thechesslifestyle.com (Chirag Soni)

item.title: 7 Proven Ways Chess Improves Your Child's Academic Performance
item.description: Research shows students who play chess score significantly higher in math and reading. Here's exactly how chess coaching builds the cognitive skills that translate to better grades.
item.author: hello@thechesslifestyle.com (Chirag Soni)

item.title: Chess Classes for Kids Near Me: What to Look for Before You Enrol
item.description: Searching for chess classes for kids near you? Here's exactly what to check before enrolling your child — qualifications, curriculum, class size, and red flags to avoid.
item.author: hello@thechesslifestyle.com (Chirag Soni)

item.title: Best Chess Openings for Beginners: A FIDE Coach's Complete Guide
item.description: Learn the 5 best chess openings for beginners recommended by FIDE Rated coaches. Master e4, d4, the Italian Game, London System and more with step-by-step guidance.
item.author: hello@thechesslifestyle.com (Chirag Soni)
